description: R3a-5 cross-app full-summary vectors. Covers: (1) dep-fact propagation (a primary routine inheriting a dep Insert capability fact via the injected typedEdges + cone), (2) cross-app dbEffect composition (primary caller's dbEffects includes dep-originated Insert), (3) opaque-dependency coverage (symbol-only dep produces partial inheritedStatus). Hand-authored invariants were asserted against live pipeline output before emit.

vectors.name: cross-app-full-summary
vectors.description: Full R3a-5 fixture projection — the chain dep (source-bearing, DoIt→DoWrite→Insert) + a symbol-only dep (no embedded source). Counts for round-trip verification in the contract test.

depFactPropagationVector.name: dep_fact_propagation
depFactPropagationVector.description: dep-fact propagation: a primary routine calling a source-bearing dep routine (DoIt/DoWrite) inherits the dep's Insert capabilityFact via the injected typedEdges + the cone. The inherited fact has provenance=inherited (not direct).
invariants: ≥1 primary routine with inherited dep facts (cone fired cross-app)
the inherited fact has provenance=inherited (not direct)
no primary routine has inherited facts with provenance=direct

crossAppDbEffectVector.name: cross_app_dbeffect_composition
crossAppDbEffectVector.description: cross-app dbEffect composition: the primary caller UseChain() has dbEffects that include an 'insert' effect originated in the dep DoWrite() routine via cross-app composition.
invariants: ≥1 primary routine with a dep-originated dbEffect
the primary routine's dbEffect is an Insert (from dep DoWrite)

opaqueDependencyCoverageVector.name: opaque_dependency_coverage
opaqueDependencyCoverageVector.description: opaque-dependency coverage: UseSymbolOnly() calls a symbol-only dep routine (DoSomething()) with no parseable body → opaque-dependency coverage reason + partial inheritedStatus for the primary caller.
invariants: ≥1 coverage with opaque-dependency reason (cross-app, symbol-only dep)
the opaque-dependency routine has partial or unknown inheritedStatus
